title: Three from School of Education honored with 2026 awards for mentoring undergraduates
summary_en: Three members of the UWвАУMadison School of Education community have received 2026 awards for mentoring undergraduates in research, scholarly, and creative activities.

title: School of Education artists earn top honors in 2026 Arts Business Competition
summary_en: Two School of Education artists were recognized in the 2026 Arts Business Competition at UWвАУMadison: MFA candidate Fatemeh Fani received the first place award, and Maja Hastings, a 2025 Art Department alumna, finished second place.

title: Three School of Education students recognized as spring 2026 вАШnotable gradsвАЩ
summary_en: Three School of Education students вАФ Anna Bitonti, Molly Gerrish, and Heaven Williams вАФ were recently recognized as spring 2026 вАЬnotable gradsвАЭ by UWвАУMadisonвАЩs Office of Strategic Communication.
